textByHashes.315047ac2511eab9cbceb69df998731240f5806e: Sorry, but the smithery is closed. You can use the furnace for a fee, and I can hold a coffer of gold so you don't need to pay each time.
textByHashes.6feac282129bf27c3e07ce4f19f340b3953ba69e: Sorry, but the smithery is closed. But since you've completed the elite tier of the Karamja diary, I will allow you to use the furnace.
textByHashes.c6d7105d0d41cee1cf7b8bc062aa8e7c561e48a9: Sorry Bwana - I charge a fee of 20 coins to use my furnace.
textByHashes.e671c3460487fe04cd506dba1dd73e105d44f477: I'm getting out of here Bwana, the place is infested with Zombies.
